mapper.insert: INSERT INTO packing_lists ( pl_code, po_id, pl_invoice_date, client_id, pl_gross_weight, pl_status, pl_client_name, pl_client_address, pl_country, pl_buyer, pl_items_snapshot, pl_linked_documents ) SELECT #{plId}, po_id, CURRENT_DATE, client_id, NULL, '발행대기', po_client_name, po_client_address, po_country, po_buyer_name, po_items_snapshot, po_linked_documents FROM purchase_orders WHERE po_code = #{poId}
